title: Charged Creeper Player Heads
description: Get player heads with charged creeper explosions!
body:
# Charged Creeper Player Heads
In normal vanilla Minecraft, you can get mob heads with charged creeper explosions. With this plugin, you can get player heads too! When a player gets killed by a charged creeper, they will drop their head.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9725c97d3b02cde27d4e7464fe89db73eca87376_0.webp)

# Supported loaders
![Available for Bukkit](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/bukkit_vector.svg)
